expected_findings.description: Sensitive data exposure in getUser(): returns the full database row including password_hash and api_key to the client instead of stripping sensitive fields
Pagination offset bug in listUsers(): offset is calculated as page * pageSize instead of (page - 1) * pageSize, causing page 1 to skip the first batch of results entirely
No error handling in deleteUser(): database errors propagate as unhandled promise rejections instead of being caught and returned as a 500 response
Inconsistent naming convention: max_retries uses snake_case instead of the TypeScript/camelCase convention (maxRetries)
